1.name: Pilot
1.overview: A therapist and his family move across the country to escape their troubled past but quickly discover that their new home comes with its own horrific baggage.

1.name: Home Invasion
1.overview: Vivien and Violet get themselves caught in a dangerous situation. Meanwhile, Ben goes back to Boston to fix a mistake that he made.

1.name: Murder House
1.overview: Vivien learns the horrific truth about the house's first residents and Ben's visitor causes him to further unravel about what really happened in the haunted house. Constance and Moira have their history revealed.

1.name: Halloween (1)
1.overview: The line between the living and the dead blurs on Halloween. Two of the house's previous residents give the Harmons decorating advice.

1.name: Halloween (2)
1.overview: Tate comes face to face with his past, and Ben and Vivien are haunted by a new houseguest before Halloween night comes to an end.

1.name: Piggy, Piggy
1.overview: Constance enlists Violet's assistance with Tate. Ben helps a new patient confront his fears.

1.name: Open House
1.overview: Moira persuades a buyer to make an offer while Constance and Larry work against her efforts.

1.name: Rubber Man
1.overview: The man in the rubber suit is revealed.

1.name: Spooky Little Girl
1.overview: One of history's most famous murder victims pays the house a visit. Constance discovers more of Tate's bad behavior.

1.name: Smoldering Children
1.overview: Violet learns about the rules of the house. The truth about Larry's condition is explained. Constance is interrogated by the police.

1.name: Birth
1.overview: Vivien gives birth. Tate and Violet attempt to rid the house of some of its ghosts for good.

1.name: Afterbirth
1.overview: In the aftermath of family tragedy, Ben tries to take his child out of the Murder House. Meanwhile, Violet and Vivien accustom themselves to their new living arrangements, Constance raises Tate's child as her own and a new family buys the house.

10.name: Cape Fear
10.overview: A struggling writer, his pregnant wife, and their daughter move to an isolated beach town for the winter. Once they're settled in, the town's true residents begin to make themselves known.

10.name: Pale
10.overview: A quick fix for Harry's writer's block has unexpected side effects. Two eccentric locals offer Harry a helping hand.

10.name: Thirst
10.overview: Harry's newfound talent brings an unexpected visitor to town. Alma decides to take matters into her own hands.

10.name: Blood Buffet
10.overview: The dark history of Provincetown and its residents are brought to light.

10.name: Gaslight
10.overview: Harry struggles to keep Alma under control. Doris is pushed past her limits.

10.name: Winter Kills
10.overview: Ursula devises a sinister plan. The Gardners write their final act.

10.name: Take Me to Your Leader
10.overview: A group of college students on a camping trip are swept up in a horrifying and deadly conspiracy decades in the making.

10.name: Inside
10.overview: The President struggles with the morality of a deal he must make.

10.name: Blue Moon
10.overview: An unexpected visitor arrives at the White House and reveals the details of a very horrific plan.

10.name: The Future Perfect
10.overview: Mamie takes matters into her own hands. The fate of the future is revealed.

11.name: Something's Coming
11.overview: Mysterious deaths and disappearances ramp up in the city. A doctor makes a frightening discovery, and a local reporter becomes tomorrow's headline.

11.name: Thank You for Your Service
11.overview: Gino grapples with his trauma. Patrick's search takes him to dark places. A stranger contacts Hannah with a grave warning.

11.name: Smoke Signals
11.overview: Without the NYPD's help, Gino is forced to get resourceful. A traumatizing event brings dangerous suspects closer than ever.

11.name: Black Out
11.overview: As darkness consumes the city, evil takes root in the unlikeliest of places...

11.name: Bad Fortune
11.overview: Hannah receives concerning news while Patrick suffers a loss; the city's most dangerous resident reveals his true motives.

11.name: The Body
11.overview: A chilling event from Patrick's past returns to haunt him. Gino and Henry are determined to uncover it at any cost.

11.name: The Sentinel
11.overview: Patrick's search reaches an epic conclusion; the group shifts its focus, but a different plan is in store for Hannah.

11.name: Fire Island
11.overview: Terrifying events at Fire Island rupture the group and force them to reconsider everything.

11.name: Requiem 1981/1987 (1)
11.overview: As vitality expires, two old friends are led through unique journeys of retrospection.

11.name: Requiem 1981/1987 (2)
11.overview: Grief and peril dominate Gino; the discovery of a tragedy becomes a revelation for Adam.

12.name: Multiply Thy Pain
12.overview: After multiple failed attempts of IVF, actress Anna Victoria Alcott wants nothing more than to start a family. As the buzz around her recent film grows, she fears that something may be targeting her - and her pursuit of motherhood.

12.name: Rockabye
12.overview: It’s awards season and Anna is primed to be a major player in contention. After a frightening encounter convinces her that she’s being followed, she begins to question who she can trust.

12.name: When the Bough Breaks
12.overview: As Anna and Dex settle into their Hamptons sanctuary, the comfort begins to fade. Her circle of trust is slowly shrinking, and doubt creeps into Anna’s head - could the evil be right under her nose?

12.name: Vanishing Twin
12.overview: With help from Siobhan, a major announcement helps restore Anna’s public image. Behind closed doors however, something powerful seems to be taking over.

12.name: Preech
12.overview: Anna senses the dark presence closing in on her, closer than ever. Ms. Preecher reveals pieces of her past and may know the truth about what's happening to Anna and Dex.

12.name: Opening Night
12.overview: A glimpse into Anna's past reveals why she craves motherhood, while Dex's troubling family life is dragged into the spotlight.

12.name: Ave Hestia
12.overview: Entrenched in her grapple for fame and motherhood, Anna may be involved in a cycle much bigger - and older - than she realizes.

12.name: Little Gold Man
12.overview: The world around Anna is starting to crescendo in every way: her career path continues to skyrocket, while her personal life is more stressful than ever - just in time for Hollywood's big night.

12.name: The Auteur
12.overview: Her choices have unknowingly led to deadly consequences, but Anna can still have it all - for a price.

2.name: Welcome to Briarcliff
2.overview: Terrifying evils blur the boundaries between reality and insanity at the Briarcliff Manor.

2.name: Tricks and Treats
2.overview: An exorcist is called to Briarcliff to help save a troubled farm boy; Sister Jude's darkest secret is revealed.

2.name: Nor'easter
2.overview: A violent storm allows a group of patients to plan a daring escape; Sister Jude is haunted by her past.

2.name: I Am Anne Frank (1)
2.overview: A new patient exposes Arden's past; Kit learns why Grace was admitted to Briarcliff.

2.name: I Am Anne Frank (2)
2.overview: Sister Jude employs a renowned Nazi hunter to gather evidence against Arden; Kit makes a surprising confession; Bloody Face is unmasked.

2.name: The Origins of Monstrosity
2.overview: A mysterious little girl is abandoned at Briarcliff; the Monsignor makes a Faustian pact with Dr. Arden; the origin of Bloody Face is revealed.

2.name: Dark Cousin
2.overview: Sister Mary Eunice is terrified to discover a dark angel at Briarcliff; Kit makes a bold move to be reunited with Grace.

2.name: Unholy Night
2.overview: A murderous Santa wreaks havoc on Briarcliff; Sister Jude faces off with the devil; Arden has a shocking encounter in the death chute.

2.name: The Coat Hanger
2.overview: The Monsignor takes an unlikely convert under his wing; Lana secures a new piece of evidence that can exonerate Kit; Dr. Arden witnesses a miraculous return.

2.name: The Name Game
2.overview: The Monsignor confronts the Devil. Dr. Arden's experiments reach a shocking conclusion. Dr. Thredson facilitates a surprising reunion for Kit.

2.name: Spilt Milk
2.overview: Grace tells Kit devastating news about the aliens' experiments on Alma; Dr. Thredson receives an unexpected visitor; the Monsignor goes to extreme lengths to silence Jude.

2.name: Continuum
2.overview: A deadly new inmate threatens Sister Jude's chance of release; Grace's obsession with the aliens turns violent.

2.name: Madness Ends
2.overview: Johnny sets out to complete his father's work; Lana leads the charge to finally shut down Briarcliff.

3.name: Bitchcraft
3.overview: A young girl discovers she possesses a strange genetic affliction tracing back to the dark days of Salem; Fiona Goode returns to town.

3.name: Boy Parts
3.overview: Fiona helps Zoe and Madison deal with a horrible tragedy; Delphine LaLaurie struggles to adjust to modern life; Cordelia faces a dark decision about her family.

3.name: The Replacements
3.overview: Fiona takes on an unlikely protégé; a guilt-ridden Zoe tries to give Kyle his old life back; Madison has a fiery exchange with Joan Ramsey.

3.name: Fearful Pranks Ensue
3.overview: Fiona's choices rattle a decades-long truce between the Salem witches and Marie Laveau; the Council of Witchcraft pays a surprise visit to the academy with disturbing allegations.

3.name: Burn, Witch. Burn!
3.overview: Besieged by Marie Laveau's army, Zoe unleashes a new power; Fiona and Myrtle clash over control of the coven; Madame LaLaurie is confronted by old ghosts.

3.name: The Axeman Cometh
3.overview: Zoe, Queenie and Nan make contact with a dark spirit trapped in the academy; Cordelia's new power brings on a heartbreaking revelation.

3.name: The Dead
3.overview: Fiona finds purpose in a dangerous love affair; Queenie questions her place in the Coven; Cordelia makes a decision about her mother.

3.name: The Sacred Taking
3.overview: Cordelia rallies the girls in the fight to stop Fiona; a dangerous new enemy puts Misty in the cross hairs; the rivalry between Marie Laveau and Delphine comes to a head.

3.name: Head
3.overview: Cordelia's attacker is revealed. Fiona looks to form an alliance with Marie Laveau. Nan learns a disturbing truth about Luke's past.

3.name: The Magical Delights of Stevie Nicks
3.overview: Fiona attempts to out the new supreme with a visit from Stevie Nicks; Cordelia learns the truth about Hank and the witch hunters; Madison tries to eliminate her competition for the supremacy.

3.name: Protect the Coven
3.overview: Fiona and Laveau have a deadly face off with The Corporation; Cordelia makes a desperate sacrifice.

3.name: Go to Hell
3.overview: Cordelia's latest vision puts the coven's future in question; the girls manifest powerful new gifts; Queenie's search for Marie Laveau leads her to hell and back.

3.name: The Seven Wonders
3.overview: A new Supreme rises.

4.name: Monsters Among Us
4.overview: One of the only surviving sideshows in the country struggles to stay in business during the dawning era of television; police make a terrifying discovery at a local farmhouse.

4.name: Massacres and Matinees
4.overview: A citywide curfew threatens to shut down the freak show; a strongman from Ethel's troubled past arrives at camp; Gloria arranges a terrifying play date for Dandy; the Tattler Twins reveal a talent that could knock Elsa from the spotlight.

4.name: Edward Mordrake (1)
4.overview: The freaks refuse to perform on Halloween due to an old carny superstition; Jimmy is smitten by a woman claiming to be a fortuneteller; Ethel receives life-changing news.

4.name: Edward Mordrake (2)
4.overview: Edward Mordrake continues his search for a Freak to add to his ghostly coterie. Elsa tells the grisly story of her days in Germany. Jimmy and Maggie have a run-in with the Twisted Clown.

4.name: Pink Cupcakes
4.overview: Stanley and Maggie hatch a plan to murder the Freaks. Gloria hides the evidence of Dandy's gruesome new hobby. A health scare reveals Desiree may not be the oddity she once thought.

4.name: Bullseye
4.overview: Elsa unveils a dangerous new act. Stanley puts pressure on Maggie to murder Jimmy. Paul indulges in a secret romance.

4.name: Test of Strength
4.overview: The women of the Freak Show rally against Dell after his latest act of violence. A strange encounter with Dandy raises Jimmy’s suspicion about the clown murders.

4.name: Blood Bath
4.overview: Recent disappearances around camp raise Ethel’s suspicion of Elsa. Gloria makes a last ditch effort to contain Dandy’s bloodlust.

4.name: Tupperware Party Massacre
4.overview: In the wake of a tragic loss, Jimmy sinks into a drunken despair. A reading from Maggie spurs Dandy to action. Stanley and Elsa track down the Twins.

4.name: Orphans
4.overview: The death of a Freak sparks troubling behavior in Pepper. Elsa reveals the history of the Freak Show. Desiree grows suspicious of Maggie.

4.name: Magical Thinking
4.overview: Elsa prepares for her move to Hollywood. The Twins grow enamored with a traveling salesman. Dell plots Jimmy’s escape from police custody.

4.name: Show Stoppers
4.overview: Dandy gives the Twins troubling information about Chester. Maggie vows to prove her loyalty to Jimmy. The Freaks enforce their harsh code of justice.

4.name: Curtain Call
4.overview: The Freaks rebel against new management. Dandy prepares for his debut performance. Elsa arrives in Tinseltown.

5.name: Checking In
5.overview: Detective and family man John Lowe investigates a chain of gruesome murders in Los Angeles. A mysterious tip points him to the enigmatic Hotel Cortez.

5.name: Chutes and Ladders
5.overview: Fashion mogul Will Drake brings couture to the Hotel Cortez. A model catches The Countess's eye. John learns about the hotel's sadistic first owner.

5.name: Mommy
5.overview: Alex is pushed to her breaking point after Scarlett stirs up memories of Holden. Donovan is targeted by a dangerous rival of The Countess.

5.name: Devil's Night
5.overview: John receives an invitation to attend an exclusive Devil's Night Soiree. Alex tries to diagnose Holden's strange condition.

5.name: Room Service
5.overview: Alex uses an unconventional treatment to save a dying patient. A Halloween-hating couple tests Iris's limits.

5.name: Room 33
5.overview: Ramona and Donovan enact their plan for revenge. Liz Taylor finds true love. The resident of Room 33 is revealed.

5.name: Flicker
5.overview: Will Drake's renovations uncover one of the Hotel's greatest secrets. John undergoes psychiatric evaluation. The Countess learns the fate of her first love.

5.name: The Ten Commandments Killer
5.overview: John closes in on The Ten Commandments Killer. Sally's arrangement with March is revealed.

5.name: She Wants Revenge
5.overview: The Countess is reunited with her one true love. Donovan and Ramona take another stab at revenge. A careless decision lands Alex in hot water.

5.name: She Gets Revenge
5.overview: Alex enlists John's help to contain an outbreak. Donovan learns the Countess' true intentions. Liz and Iris plan to leave the hotel for good.

5.name: Battle Royale
5.overview: Ramona draws vitality from an unlikely source. Sally uses her past to negotiate her future. Scarlett learns the truth of her family's affliction.

5.name: Be Our Guest
5.overview: Iris and Liz oversee a new era at the Cortez. John and Alex struggle to adapt to life outside the hotel.

6.name: Chapter 1
6.overview: A young interracial couple move into a farmhouse in North Carolina after purchasing it with their life savings. However, unearthly phenomena begin occurring and things are not what they seem.

6.name: Chapter 2
6.overview: While the Millers discover some of their house's history, Lee falls into old habits and her daughter, Flora, makes a new friend.

6.name: Chapter 3
6.overview: Nightmares become an inescapable reality as unique stories of people's lives in America reveal the astonishing power of the supernatural.

6.name: Chapter 4
6.overview: Scathach presents herself for the first time and reveals what she wants. However, Tomasyn and the ghost settlers have other plans.

6.name: Chapter 5
6.overview: The mob comes for Shelby, Matt and Flora, but they get help from a new face to escape the Butcher's wrath.

6.name: Chapter 6
6.overview: After the wrap of the show My Roanoke Nightmare, the producer creates a follow up show called Return to Roanoke, bringing the actors of the previous show and the real Shelby, Matt, and Lee, back to the house.

6.name: Chapter 7
6.overview: Audrey, Lee, and Monet find themselves in grave danger as they search for Rory; Agnes comes back for revenge; Matt and Shelby deal with the ramifications of their situation.

6.name: Chapter 8
6.overview: Audrey, Monet, and Lee remain hostages of the Polks, while Shelby and Dominic try to think of a way to escape the wrath of The Butcher back at the house.

6.name: Chapter 9
6.overview: A new actor shows up to the house per Sidney's request; three young adults enter the woods to shoot footage of the blood moon and the history of the house for the web. Meanwhile Lee, Monet, and Audrey remain on the run.

6.name: Chapter 10
6.overview: Lee Harris, the lone survivor of Return to Roanoke: Three Days in Hell, agrees to an interview live on television, the Lana Winters Special.

7.name: Election Night
7.overview: After Trump is elected President, Ally Mayfair-Richards is beset by all of her old phobias... and they appear to be coming to life.

7.name: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark
7.overview: Ally, Ivy and Oz meet the new neighbors. Kai runs for city council. Detective Samuels investigates a murder. A blackout terrorizes Ally.

7.name: Neighbors from Hell
7.overview: The community turns on Ally after she shoots and kills a Hispanic man. At home tensions between Ally and Ivy grow worse, and Kai may be Ally's only hope.
Kai gathers familiar faces to join his cult as the events surrounding 11/8/17 are explored.

7.name: Holes
7.overview: Kai asks for the cult members to prove their loyalty against one of their own. Meanwhile, Ally meets with Rudy to tell him about her problems dealing with Ivy's departure.

7.name: Mid-Western Assassin
7.overview: Ally takes Meadow to Rudy in the hopes that she will confirm her story about the cult. However, Meadow has a change of heart. Meanwhile, an unexpected opponent runs against Kai in the city council election.

7.name: Valerie Solanas Died for Your Sins: Scumbag
7.overview: Kai begins to solidify his grasp on power after winning the election. A mysterious woman warns Beverly, Ivy and Winter that Kai will soon cast them aside.

7.name: Winter of Our Discontent
7.overview: Ally confronts Kai meanwhile Winter must choose between Kai and Beverly when he makes a questionable decision.

7.name: Drink the Kool-Aid
7.overview: Kai seeks to test the loyalty of his cult. Ally seeks revenge. Oz learns about his parentage.

7.name: Charles (Manson) in Charge
7.overview: Kai receives visits from Charles Manson as he begins to question everyone around him.

7.name: Great Again
7.overview: Kai sets his master plan into motion as Ally's true intentions are revealed.

8.name: The End
8.overview: The end of the world happens when the bombs drop, and the survivors wonder if surviving is worth it after the Cooperative gives them shelter.

8.name: The Morning After
8.overview: A new occupant arrives at the Outpost with alarming news, causing a domino effect of lust, betrayal and self-destruction.

8.name: Forbidden Fruit
8.overview: As Ms. Mead grapples with her identity, Michael reveals more of his; Coco's ex rears his ugly head; Venable crafts a plan to give the residents of Outpost 3 one magical night.

8.name: Could It Be... Satan?
8.overview: Michael's history as a teenager, and how he came to find himself at the Hawthorne Boy's school, is revealed.

8.name: Boy Wonder
8.overview: After witnessing the Apocalypse, Coredelia must act quickly to stop Michael or face the end of days.

8.name: Return to Murder House
8.overview: Madison and Behold travel to the Murder House to uncover the origins of Michael Langdon.

8.name: Traitor
8.overview: Cordelia takes steps to punish the traitors among the coven and stop Michael from rising to power as the Antichrist.

8.name: Sojourn
8.overview: Michael questions his father's unholy plan for world annihilation, and is directed on the proper path to recover Miriam.

8.name: Fire and Reign
8.overview: Michael strikes at the school, but Cordelia, Myrtle, and Mallory escape him. Mutt and Jeff step in to guide Michael to his destiny, and recruit Wilhelmina to administer the Outposts.

8.name: Apocalypse Then
8.overview: The surviving witches travel to Outpost 3 to stand in final battle against the Antichrist.

9.name: Camp Redwood
9.overview: In the summer of 1984, five friends escape Los Angeles to work as counselors at Camp Redwood. As they adjust to their new jobs, they quickly learn that the only thing scarier than campfire tales is the past coming to haunt you.

9.name: Mr. Jingles
9.overview: Darkness descends upon the camp. Although it's lights out, evil has no curfew.

9.name: Slashdance
9.overview: Imitation is the best form of tragedy. Coming clean can be pretty messy.

9.name: True Killers
9.overview: Mr. Jingles closes in on the one who got away as the counselors rally to escape Camp Redwood.

9.name: Red Dawn
9.overview: As twilight broaches, the survivors brace for a final brawl.

9.name: Episode 100
9.overview: With the horrors of the night behind them the survivors deal with the fallout of their choices.

9.name: The Lady in White
9.overview: A hidden chapter of Camp Redwood is revealed. The survivors help a stranded hitchhiker.

9.name: Rest in Pieces
9.overview: A deadly trio emerges, hell-bent on unleashing a new era at Camp Redwood. Our former counselors desperately try to keep history from repeating itself.

9.name: Final Girl
9.overview: Camp Redwood draws in a lost soul looking for closure.

1.name: Uno
1.overview: Jimmy works his magic in the courtroom. Unexpected inspiration leads him to an unconventional pursuit of potential clients.

1.name: Mijo
1.overview: As his troubles escalate to a boiling point, Jimmy finds himself in dire straits. An act of carelessness puts Chuck at risk.

1.name: Nacho
1.overview: Jimmy pulls out all the stops to prove that his dangerous client is innocent, even though it causes some friction with Kim.

1.name: Hero
1.overview: Jimmy devises a bold plan to obtain new clients, but must face consequences when his relationships become strained.

1.name: Alpine Shepherd Boy
1.overview: Alarming news disrupts Jimmy's efforts at drumming up new business, forcing him to make a difficult choice.

1.name: Five-O
1.overview: Mike's tragic past comes back to haunt him, and he's forced to seek help from an unusual source. Jimmy's moral compass is put to the test.

2.overview: Mike aims to settle the score with an enemy; an unexpected opportunity presents itself to Jimmy.

2.name: Nailed
2.overview: Mike takes a methodical approach to his mission. Someone questions Chuck's capabilities. Jimmy faces a personal dilemma.

2.name: Klick
2.overview: Jimmy must make a hard choice. Mike takes control of matters. Hamlin delivers shocking news.

3.overview: Jimmy and Kim hire an assistant. Mike seeks out a mysterious acquaintance. Chuck uses the law to gain an advantage over Jimmy.

3.overview: Jimmy decides to represent a new client to Kim's dismay. Mike meets a formidable ally who gives a tempting offer.

3.name: Expenses

3.name: Slip

4.overview: Jimmy struggles to cope with Chuck's tragic death. Mike ponders his role at Madrigal. Howard makes a startling confession.

4.overview: Jimmy puts a risky plan into motion. As alliances shift, Nacho finds himself in the crosshairs. Kim contemplates her future.

4.overview: A restless Jimmy embarks on a new endeavor while Mike burns bridges. Kim pursues her bliss. Nacho tries to survive a turf war.

4.overview: Jimmy identifies a new market for his talents. Mike vets a potential partnership. Kim drives a hard bargain.

4.name: Piñata
4.overview: While Jimmy dreams of Wexler-McGill, Kim makes a bold move. Mike puts a plan into motion for Gus.

4.overview: Jimmy expands his business, but runs into a problem that only Kim can solve. Gus intervenes in Hector's medical care. Mike deals with a setback.

4.overview: Jimmy goes to great lengths to right a wrong, as Kim pulls out all the stops for a case. Mike lets his team blow off steam. Nacho receives a visitor.

4.overview: Jimmy and Kim unburden themselves, risking their relationship in the process. Nacho is forced to make the rounds with Lalo. Mike has cause to worry.

4.overview: Jimmy turns the page on his reputation. Lalo tracks a loose end in Gus' operation. Mike is forced to make a difficult decision.

5.overview: Now doing business as Saul Goodman, Jimmy unveils an unorthodox strategy for client development that tests Kim's tolerance of his new legal persona. Lalo searches for the mysterious Michael, only to discover a problem within his own operation.

5.overview: Jimmy's promotional stunt has unintended consequences. Nacho takes extreme measures to earn Lalo's trust. Saul is a success at the courthouse but still has yet to win Kim over. Simmering with rage and self-loathing, Mike loses his temper.

5.overview: Jimmy's business enters uncharted territory. Kim's confidence is tested when she's faced with a legal problem only she can solve. Nacho navigates increased pressure from Gus. Mike continues to spiral.

5.overview: As Jimmy doubles down on Saul Goodman, a deeply conflicted Kim brings him an interesting proposition, Gus makes a sacrifice in order to play the long game, and Mike attempts to smooth things over with his family.

5.overview: Jimmy and Kim make a sideways move that takes a serious turn. Nacho gets closer to the cartel than he'd like.

6.overview: Nacho runs for his life. Jimmy and Kim hatch a plan. Mike questions his allegiances.

6.name: Carrot and Stick

3.name: Topsy
3.overview: Louise expects to get a charge out of taking down her Thomas Edison-obsessed science teacher when she re-creates one of the famous inventor's experiments that involved electrocuting an elephant.

3.name: Two for Tina
3.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S03/Bob's Burgers - S03E17 - Two for Tina WEBDL-1080p.mkv
3.overview: Jimmy Jr. is threatened when Tina starts dating a ballet dancer named Josh and the two boys get into an epic dance-off for her heart

3.name: It Snakes a Village
3.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S03/Bob's Burgers - S03E18 - It Snakes a Village WEBDL-1080p.mkv
3.overview: The Belcher family road-trips down to Florida to visit Linda's parents who live in a senior home that - to Linda's complete horror - is full of senior swingers! Plus, to keep themselves entertained, Tina, Gene and Louise go on a hunt for a mysterious python that allegedly ate one of the residents' dogs.

3.name: Family Fracas
3.overview: After the family car breaks down and ruins their plans for a movie night out, the Belchers find themselves competing on the TV game show "Family Fracas!" To the dismay of the program's host, they keep winning and coming back each night...that is until their lucky streak comes to a suspicious end.

3.name: The Kids Run the Restaurant
3.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S03/Bob's Burgers - S03E20 - The Kids Run the Restaurant WEBDL-1080p.mkv
3.overview: After Bob cuts his finger and faints at the sight of his own blood, Linda brings him to the hospital and leaves the kids home alone. Not ones to waste a golden opportunity, Tina, Gene and Louise transform the basement of the restaurant into a makeshift casino. But they get more than they gamble for when landlord Mr. Fischoeder stops by and catches them in action.

3.name: Boyz 4 Now
3.overview: While accompanying Tina to a "Boyz 4 Now" concert, Louise develops a crush on one of the lead singers, Boo Boo - and is in disbelief that she actually likes a boy! Meanwhile, Gene gets creative - and slightly offensive - in a table-setting competition.

3.name: Carpe Museum
3.overview: Bob chaperones a school trip to the museum and experiences some father-daughter bonding with Louise, while Gene and his gang are on the lookout for exhibits with busts, and not the kind that are sculpted out of stone. Later, on the museum steps, Linda offers her distinctive chanting talents to striking workers.

3.name: The Unnatural
3.overview: After Gene loses his confidence at his baseball game, Linda decides to sign him up for baseball camp. The only problem? She needs money to pay for it! Meanwhile, Tina discovers her love for espresso and becomes a caffeine addict.

4.name: A River Runs Through Bob
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E01 - A River Runs Through Bob WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: Bob, Linda and the kids brave river rapids, squirrels and separation while on a camping adventure.

4.name: Fort Night
4.overview: The kids' Halloween adventure goes awry when Louise's friend Millie takes them hostage.

4.name: Seaplane!
4.overview: Linda's attempt to spice up date night by signing up for flying lessons backfires when Bob refuses to go with her and she ends up the target of a charming pilot.

4.name: My Big Fat Greek Bob
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E04 - My Big Fat Greek Bob WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: When Bob gets a job cooking at a frat house, he and the brothers find themselves in the middle of a prank war; the kids hatch a plan to invade the frat house.

4.name: Turkey in a Can
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E05 - Turkey in a Can WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: Bob discovers his carefully prepared turkey was put in the toilet in an act of Thanksgiving sabotage.

4.name: Purple Rain-Union
4.overview: Linda reunites her old band to perform at her high school reunion; a woman who had a crush on Bob in high school attempts to impress him.

4.name: Bob and Deliver
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E07 - Bob and Deliver WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: Bob becomes a substitute home economics teacher at Tina's school and creates a restaurant in the classroom.

4.name: Christmas in the Car
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E08 - Christmas in the Car WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: The Belchers spend Christmas Eve running from a candy cane-shaped truck; Teddy gets stuck in the Santa trap.

4.name: Slumber Party
4.overview: Linda plans a surprise slumber party for Louise, much to her dismay; Louise tries to make the girls go home; Linda becomes infatuated some raccoons that are getting into the restaurant's dumpster.

4.name: Presto Tina-O
4.overview: In order to get closer to Jimmy Jr., Tina becomes a magician's assistant; Bob becomes the victim of a curse.

4.name: Easy Com-mercial, Easy Go-mercial
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E11 - Easy Com-mercial, Easy Go-mercial WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: The Belchers hire a documentary filmmaker and a former football star to help them film a commercial.

4.name: The Frond Files
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E12 - The Frond Files WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: Bob and Linda learn that their kids' essays about their fantasy versions of the school are considered offensive and too creative.

4.name: Mazel-Tina
4.overview: Tina isn't invited to a classmate's bat mitzvah but ends up at the event anyway when her family is hired to cater.

4.name: Uncle Teddy
4.overview: When Bob and Linda plan a romantic getaway at a burger convention, they ask Teddy to watch the kids; Teddy tries to put Tina's crush in his place.

4.name: The Kids Rob a Train
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E15 - The Kids Rob a Train WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: When the Belchers go on a train trip, Gene, Louise and Tina are seated in a separate car; Linda and Bob indulge in a wine-tasting.

4.name: I Get a Psy-Chic Out of You
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E16 - I Get Psy-chic Out of You WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: After predicting a telemarketer's call at the restaurant, Linda and the kids believe she's psychic.

4.name: The Equestranauts
4.overview: Tina attends a convention based on an animated show about ponies and finds that many of the fans are middle-aged men; when Tina is tricked out of her rare pony toy, Bob goes under cover to get it back.

4.name: Ambergris
4.overview: When Gene, Louise and Tina discover a valuable whale by-product on the beach, Louise tries to cheat her siblings out of the profit; Bob and Linda deal with their unstable landlord.

4.name: The Kids Run Away
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E19 - The Kids Run Away WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: When she learns she has a cavity, Louise runs away from the dentist's office and seeks refuge at Aunt Gail's house.

4.name: Gene It On
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E20 - Gene It On WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: When Tina is unable to speak after falling and biting her tongue during a cheerleading audition, Louise offers to be her translator.

4.name: Wharf Horse (or How Bob Saves/Destroys The Town) (1)
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E21 - Wharf Horse (or How Bob Saves+Destroys the Town) (1) WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: Motivated by the promise of a beachside burger restaurant, Bob helps Felix talk Mr. Fischoeder into selling Wonder Wharf.

4.name: World Wharf II: The Wharfening (or How Bob Saves/Destroys The Town) (2)
4.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S04/Bob's Burgers - S04E22 - World Wharf II - The Wharfening (or How Bob Saves+Destroys the Town) (2) WEBDL-1080p.mkv
4.overview: Linda and the kids must save the day when Felix's desperate measures put Bob and Mr. Fischoeder in danger.

5.name: Work Hard or Die Trying, Girl
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E01 - Work Hard or Die Trying, Girl WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: Gene tries to make one of his dreams a reality when he gets the opportunity to make a musical version of Die Hard at the Wagstaff Fall Festival.

5.name: Tina and the Real Ghost
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E02 - Tina and the Real Ghost WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: Tina begins an out-of-this-world romance with a ghost that is believed to be living in the Belcher's basement.

5.name: Friends with Burger-fits
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E03 - Friends with Burger-fits WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: Teddy's health is a cause for concern. So he and Bob attend a bootcamp. The kids come up with a new sport to play in the walk-in refrigerator.

5.name: Dawn of the Peck
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E04 - Dawn of the Peck WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: While Bob is boycotting the holiday, Linda and the kids spend Thanksgiving at the First Annual Fischoeder Turk-tacular Turkey Town Festival. However, a wild bird attack leads to total mayhem.

5.name: Best Burger
5.overview: Bob enters a burger-making contest, only to discover that his distinguishing ingredient is missing! To help out their dad, the kids go on a mission to find the ever-so-important black garlic.

5.name: Father of the Bob
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E06 - Father of the Bob WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: Bob and his dad, "Big Bob", try to outdo each other in the kitchen when they rehash an old argument at Big Bob's Christmas party. Meanwhile, the kids compete to get the best present for Bob.

5.name: Tina Tailor Soldier Spy
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E07 - Tina Tailor Soldier Spy WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: Tina goes undercover in her old Thundergirls troop to find the mole who is giving away their cookie secrets. Meanwhile, Linda dyes her hair blonde.

5.name: Midday Run
5.overview: Who runs the halls? Tina! When Tina is up for a hall monitor promotion, she's determined to do whatever it takes to nab the powerful job.

5.name: Speakeasy Rider
5.overview: Tina, Gene and Louise are ready to put the pedal to the metal when they join a go-kart league. Meanwhile, back at the restaurant Bob and Teddy partner up to serve Teddy's home-brewed beer on the sly.

5.name: Late Afternoon in the Garden of Bob and Louise
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E10 - Late Afternoon in the Garden of Bob and Louise WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: Bob agrees to give Logan a job at the restaurant in exchange for a plot at the local community garden.

5.name: Can't Buy Me Math
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E11 - Can't Buy Me Math WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: Tina teams up with Darryl to win the Cupid's Couple contest at the school dance. Meanwhile, Linda plans a full week of ambitious Valentine's Day activities for her and Bob.

5.name: The Millie-churian Candidate
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E12 - The Millie-churian Candidate WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: Tina and Louise volunteer to run Jimmy Junior's class president campaign in order to keep Millie from winning, and ruining the school. Meanwhile, Bob becomes obsessed with a knife after talking himself into buying it for $300.

5.name: The Gayle Tales
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E13 - The Gayle Tales WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: Gayle arrives at Bob's Burgers in tears because her date for the evening was cancelled and she had theater tickets. Desperate to get out of the house after being grounded, the kids compete to be Aunt Gayle's "date" for the evening via an essay contest.

5.name: L'il Hard Dad
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E14 - L'il Hard Dad WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: Bob becomes obsessed with his new automatic helicopter. When it falls apart for no reason, he enters into a battle with the manufacturer in order to receive a refund. Gene assists Bob in his quest, but things quickly get out of hand and end in a crazy helicopter battle. Meanwhile, Louise and Linda help Tina prepare for her oral book report.

5.name: Adventures in Chinchilla-sitting
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E15 - Adventures in Chinchilla-sitting WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: Bob and Linda head out on the town for a date - but to Linda's dismay, Bob's idea of romance proves "trivial." Meanwhile, a wild chinchilla chase ensues after the school pet that Louise was charged with watching escapes out the front door.

5.name: The Runway Club
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E16 - The Runway Club WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: The kids are sentenced to Saturday detention and will do anything it takes to leave early, so they can attend the Cotton Candy Festival. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda believe they are being scammed by a young girl at the restaurant.

5.name: Itty Bitty Ditty Committee
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E17 - Itty Bitty Ditty Committee WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: Gene starts a band with Tina, Louise, Rudy, Peter and Daryl, only to be kicked out and left on his own. After declaring that he will never play his Casio again, Tina and Louise join forces to help Gene rediscover his love of music. Meanwhile, Linda deals with a horrible armpit rash that has everyone disgusted!

5.name: Eat, Spray, Linda
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E18 - Eat, Spray, Linda WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: It's Linda's birthday and Bob needs more time to plan her birthday surprise. But when he sends her out of the house as a distraction, she goes missing! Mayhem ensues as the Belchers must work together to find Linda.

5.name: Housetrap
5.overview: In true Belcher fashion, the family gets stuck in a terrible storm while vacationing at a beach house in Craggy Neck. The storm is the least of their worries, however, when they are forced to take shelter with the mysterious owner of the home.

5.name: Hawk & Chick
5.overview: Bob and Louise are thrilled when they meet Hawk, the star of their favorite martial arts series, and are quick to offer help upon learning about his family troubles.

5.name: The Oeder Games
5.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S05/Bob's Burgers - S05E21 - The Oeder Games WEBDL-1080p.mkv
5.overview: With the threat of a rent increase on Ocean Avenue, Bob and the other tenants rebel! After approaching Fischoeder, the tenants find out that they will have to compete in order to convince him to keep their rents reasonable.

6.name: Sliding Bobs
6.overview: Bob notices that he has started to lose his hair. In a wave of nostalgia, Linda reminisces about Bob’s mustache and how it made her fall for him years ago. Meanwhile, the kids tell their own versions of the story of how their parents met.

6.name: The Land Ship
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E02 - The Land Ship WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: The upcoming Land Ship parade could mean increased business for Bob, until he learns that two port-o-potties will be placed in front the restaurant. Meanwhile, Tina learns from her friends that she’s boring, so she joins up with Jordan who has been vandalizing the school with graffiti. But when Jordan wants to spray graffiti on the Land Ship, Tina must decide between ruining the parade or disappointing her new crush.

6.name: The Hauntening
6.overview: The Belchers are ready for an amazing Halloween! Louise reveals that she has never been scared before and the family sets out to visit a spooky haunted house. When trouble ensues following their visit, the Belchers find themselves in a zany situation more frightening than they bargained for!

6.name: Gayle Makin' Bob Sled
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E04 - Gayle Makin' Bob Sled WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: When Gayle is injured, Linda sends Bob off to pick her up, so that she doesn't miss out on Thanksgiving festivities. But an unexpected snowstorm derails his trip home, and his epic plan to prepare the turkey is foiled. Bob then must put the fate of the turkey and the Belcher Thanksgiving in Linda's hands and spend time bonding with his sister-in-law.

6.name: Nice-Capades
6.overview: When a grumpy mall Santa threatens the kids with the dreaded Naughty List, Gene, Tina and Louise decide to put on a musical performance spectacular to earn their spot on the Nice List. Can they change Santa’s mind in time to save their Christmas?

6.name: The Cook, the Steve, the Gayle, & Her Lover
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E06 - The Cook, the Steve, the Gayle, & Her Lover WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: When Bob throws a dinner party to bond with his new friend, Gayle uses the opportunity to introduce the family to her new love interest. Little does she know, Louise has a long-standing feud with Gayle’s boyfriend and her niece will stop at nothing to break them apart. Calamity ensues as Bob attempts to impress his new buddy and the kids take action.

6.name: The Gene and Courtney Show
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E07 - The Gene and Courtney Show WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: Gene and Courtney get their big break when they are asked to be the new hosts of the morning announcements, but their romantic history threatens to get in the way. Meanwhile, Tina's attempt to play Cupid goes tragically awry when she volunteers to spear-head the Valentine's Day carnation fundraiser.

6.name: Sexy Dance Healing
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E08 - Sexy Dance Healing WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: After Bob slips on the sidewalk, he is forced to take legal action in order to pay for surgery. In a turn of events, Bob finds himself under the care of Jairo, who promises to help him heal without a doctor. Meanwhile, the kids create a fake law firm to settle their personal discrepancies.

6.name: Sacred Couch
6.overview: After a family vote rules against buying a new couch during TV Night, Louise takes matters into her own hands. The Belchers take sides as they are forced to decide whether memories are enough to keep their family sofa. Will they take the Sofa Queen’s advice and learn to love a new couch?

6.name: Lice Things Are Lice
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E10 - Lice Things Are Lice WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: When Tina volunteers alongside Nurse Liz, she finds herself involved in the biggest scandal to hit Wagstaff: a lice infestation. Meanwhile, Bob makes improvements to the restaurant that end up driving customers away. Can the Belchers juggle both a crisis at the restaurant and lice?

6.name: House of 1000 Bounces
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E11 - House of 1000 Bounces WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: When there is a bounce house crisis at Regular Sized Rudy’s birthday party, the Belcher kids devise a scheme to save the day. Meanwhile, Bob deals with an unexpected guest at the restaurant and is forced to come to terms with a longstanding fear.

6.name: Stand By Gene
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E12 - Stand by Gene WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: When Gene overhears talk about a mystical creature that lives nearby, he leads the Belcher kids and their friends on a journey to find it. Meanwhile, Linda's competitive nature takes over during downtime at the restaurant.

6.name: Wag the Hog
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E13 - Wag the Hog WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: When Bob's longtime friend, Critter, finds himself in jail for unpaid parking tickets, the Belchers decide to do what they can to help him out. Meanwhile, Linda takes on a babysitting job that becomes more work than she signed up for.

6.name: The Hormone-iums
6.overview: When Dottie Minerva comes down with a bad case of mono, Tina gets her shot as soloist of the Hormone-iums. But as she rehearses for the big assembly, Tina realizes that her role in the play could ruin her social status. Meanwhile, Linda strikes gold with a business plan that she thinks could make the Belchers rich.

6.name: Pro Tiki/Con Tiki
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E15 - Pro Tiki+Con Tiki WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: When Bob's friend, Warren, comes to town, he makes an offer to invest in the restaurant. Bob is thrilled that it finally could get a much-needed makeover, until he learns that Warren has some strong interior design choices in mind. Meanwhile, Warren's visit means one of the kids must give up their bedroom.

6.name: Bye Bye Boo Boo
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E16 - Bye Bye Boo Boo WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: When Louise hears that Boo Boo is leaving Boyz 4 Now, she enters a contest that could give Tina the chance to meet him. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda learn an interesting piece of history regarding the restaurant, which leads to tension between Bob and Jimmy Pesto.

6.name: The Horse Rider-er
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E17 - The Horse Rider-er WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: After finally convincing Bob and Linda to send her to horse camp, Tina realizes she has to part ways with Jericho, her imaginary horse. Meanwhile, Linda decides to create a restaurant camp in an attempt to make things fair for Gene and Louise.

6.name: Secret Admiral-irer
6.overview: Tina's ideas of love and romance are tested and Bob makes new friends.

6.name: Glued, Where's My Bob?
6.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S06/Bob's Burgers - S06E19 - Glued, Where's My Bob WEBDL-1080p.mkv
6.overview: Bob gets glued to the toilet in the restaurant as a result of a prank gone wrong by the kids.

7.name: Flu-ouise
7.overview: When the youngest Belcher comes down with an epic case of the flu, Linda has a mishap as she tries to deliver Louise's favorite toy to her daughter's bedside. After Louise vows that she will never forgive her family for their mistake, she falls into a wild fever dream filled with familiar faces, zany musical numbers and a crazy adventure.

7.name: Sea Me Now
7.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S07/Bob's Burgers - S07E02 - Sea Me Now WEBDL-1080p.mkv
7.overview: Teddy tries to impress his ex-wife by organizing a day trip on his newly refurbished boat; Tina attempts to prove she's responsible enough to have a cellphone by taking care of Bob's prized eraser.

7.name: Teen-A-Witch
7.overview: With Halloween quickly approaching, Tina reveals her brilliant idea that will finally win her first place in the annual costume contest. When Tammy steals her idea, Tina is forced to seek the help of Mr. Ambrose, who leads her to alternate and other-worldly methods of winning. Meanwhile, Bob is on a mission to figure out who is stealing his perfectly crafted pumpkins.

7.name: They Serve Horses, Don't They?
7.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S07/Bob's Burgers - S07E04 - They Serve Horses, Don't They WEBDL-1080p.mkv
7.overview: The Belchers find themselves involved in a full-blown investigation after Bob secures a new meat provider.

7.name: Larger Brother, Where Fart Thou?
7.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S07/Bob's Burgers - S07E05 - Larger Brother, Where Fart Thou WEBDL-1080p.mkv
7.overview: When Tina has a mishap that lands her in detention, Bob and Linda don't have a babysitter for their other kids, forcing them to let Gene and Louise stay at home alone. With the house to themselves, the younger Belchers find themselves in a sticky situation, while Bob and Linda get into surprising trouble with their accountant.

7.name: The Quirk-ducers
7.overview: When Mr. Frond’s annual play threatens to ruin the half day before Thanksgiving, Gene and Louise decide they need to sabotage it in order to save their long weekend. Unknowingly, Tina provides her holiday fan fiction as the subject matter and the kids get to work on their own version of the play. Meanwhile, Linda finds a potato with a striking resemblance to her late grandfather.

7.name: The Last Gingerbread House on the Left
7.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S07/Bob's Burgers - S07E07 - The Last Gingerbread House on the Left WEBDL-1080p.mkv
7.overview: As the Belchers prepare for Christmas, Bob gets an unexpected call from Mr. Fischoeder asking him to bring food to a party at his home. When Bob arrives, he discovers that he has gotten involved in an intense gingerbread house building competition with Mr. Fischoeder's rowdy group of friends. Meanwhile, Linda and Teddy try to inspire some Christmas cheer in the neighbors as they take the kids caroling.

7.name: Ex Mach Tina
7.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S07/Bob's Burgers - S07E08 - Ex Mach Tina WEBDL-1080p.mkv
7.overview: After hurting her ankle, Tina enrolls in a program that enables her send a robot of herself to school and the robot gives her an unexpected breakthrough with Jimmy Jr.

7.name: Bob Actually
7.overview: With Valentine's Day approaching, Tina, Gene and Louise each find themselves wrapped up in love-caused chaos. Meanwhile, Bob decides on a romantic gesture in order to impress Linda.

7.name: There's No Business Like Mr. Business Business
7.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S07/Bob's Burgers - S07E10 - There's No Business Like Mr. Business Business WEBDL-1080p.mkv
7.overview: When Gayle's cat, Mr. Business, secures pet agent Ian Amberson, Bob finds out that Linda may have been helping to fund the cat's career. Ever the skeptic, Bob is prepared to shut it down, but learns that Mr. Business could be on the verge of his big break.

7.name: A Few 'Gurt Men
7.file: /srv/media/Series/Bob.s.Burgers/Bob.s.Burgers.S07/Bob's Burgers - S07E11 - A Few 'Gurt Men WEBDL-1080p.mkv

1.name: BoJack Horseman: The BoJack Horseman Story, Chapter One
1.overview: To help with the memoir he hopes will put him back in the spotlight, BoJack hires a ghostwriter.

1.name: BoJack Hates the Troops
1.overview: BoJack finds himself the subject of national media attention after he calls the troops "jerks."

1.name: Prickly-Muffin
1.overview: BoJack reconnects with a friend from his past who moves into his house and creates pandemonium.

1.name: Zoës and Zeldas
1.overview: BoJack decides to mentor Todd; Diane's ex-boyfriend writes an article about Mr. Peanutbutter.

1.name: Live Fast, Diane Nguyen
1.overview: A business trip for BoJack and Diane takes a detour; Todd runs a scam that gets him in trouble.

1.name: Our A-Story Is A 'D' Story
1.overview: BoJack is jealous of Diane's relationship with Mr. Peanutbutter; Todd's in a new environment.

1.name: Say Anything
1.overview: BoJack sabotages himself with an epic bender; Princess Carolyn's agency merges with another.

1.name: The Telescope
1.overview: When he learns that his old friend from "Horsin' Around" is dying, BoJack tries to mend fences.

1.name: Horse Majeure
1.overview: A lovestruck BoJack tries to sabotage a wedding; Todd accepts a surprising new professional role.

1.name: One Trick Pony
1.overview: BoJack shoots a movie at Mr. Peanutbutter’s house; Diane finishes her book.

1.name: Downer Ending
1.overview: BoJack embarks on a project in his typically gonzo style, leading to a drug-fueled revelation.

1.name: Later
1.overview: Months after his memoir is released, BoJack's being considered for a role that's a lifelong dream.

2.name: Brand New Couch
2.overview: BoJack believes an upbeat attitude will change his life, but that attitude doesn't mesh well with his new acting job.

2.name: Yesterdayland
2.overview: BoJack is drawn to the one female in town who has no idea who he is (because she was in a coma). Todd opens a theme park.

2.name: Still Broken
2.overview: A funeral turns into a treasure hunt for the "Horsin' Around" cast -- and a potential schmooze-fest for Princess Caroline and Mr. Peanutbutter.

2.name: After the Party
2.overview: Princess Caroline, BoJack, Diane, and Mr. Peanutbutter learn some important lessons about love in the wake of a surprise birthday party.

2.name: Chickens
2.overview: BoJack really wants his director, Kelsey, to like him. Todd, Diane and Kelsey's daughter help a chicken who's on the lam from the police.

2.name: Higher Love
2.overview: Princess Caroline sees an opportunity when Mr. Peanutbutter's agent dies. BoJack flips when he says the "L" word out loud to Wanda.

2.name: Hank After Dark
2.overview: Diane goes off script during BoJack's book tour, jeopardizing Mr. Peanutbutter's new show. Todd gets involved in international affairs.

2.name: Let's Find Out
2.overview: BoJack is one of the celebrity guest stars on the first episode of Mr. Peanutbutter's game show, but the game doesn't go as expected.

2.name: The Shot
2.overview: BoJack cooks up a scheme with Kelsey, Todd, Princess Caroline and Mr. Peanutbutter to steal a crucial shot for the Secretariat film.

2.name: Yes And
2.overview: Todd gets sucked into the cult of improv comedy. Wanda thinks Diane is a bad influence on BoJack when he has to deal with a career crisis.

2.name: Escape from L.A.
2.overview: BoJack goes on a road trip to visit an old friend, and gets a taste of existence outside the Holywood bubble.

2.name: Out to Sea
2.overview: The important things in life becomes clear to BoJack when Todd moves out to join the improv comedy group on their special cruise ship.

3.name: Start Spreading the News
3.overview: Ana Spanakopita sends BoJack to New York to do interviews, and Todd tags along. Princess Carolyn tells Mr. Peanutbutter to get back to work.

3.name: The BoJack Horseman Show
3.overview: In 2007, Princess Carolyn finds a new project for BoJack, Diane meets Mr. Peanutbutter at the coffee shop where she works, and Todd kisses a girl.

3.name: BoJack Kills
3.overview: BoJack is framed for the murder of a Whale World dancer. Mr. Peanutbutter and Todd get into a stinky situation with the skunk next door.

3.name: Fish Out of Water
3.overview: BoJack takes an underwater trip to the Pacific Ocean Film Festival for the “Secretariat” premiere, where he tries to reach out to Kelsey.

3.name: Love And/Or Marriage
3.overview: While Todd and BoJack crash a rehearsal dinner, Diane gets high with a client. Princess Carolyn goes on a series of blind dates.

3.name: Brrap Brrap Pew Pew
3.overview: Diane's tweet lands Sextina Aquafina in hot water. Prankster and A-list actor Jurj Clooners gets under BoJack's skin.

3.name: Stop the Presses
3.overview: Todd builds a giant papier-mâché Todd head. A customer service rep gives BoJack some sound advice when he tries to cancel his newspaper subscription.

3.name: Old Acquaintance
3.overview: BoJack is up for a part in David Pincher's latest film. Diane meets Mr. Peanutbutter's brother,  and Todd takes the business in a new direction.

3.name: Best Thing That Ever Happened
3.overview: BoJack meets Princess Carolyn at Elefante, leading to a night of soul-searching as they help the staff impress a food critic.

3.name: It's You
3.overview: Mr. Peanutbutter announces the Oscar nominees. BoJack surrounds himself with admirers, but his real friendships are falling apart.

3.name: That's Too Much, Man!
3.overview: On a drug-fueled bender, BoJack and Sarah Lynn crash an AA meeting, and BoJack decides to make amends to the people he hurt.

3.name: That Went Well
3.overview: Mr. Peanutbutter saves the day. Todd gets exciting news. BoJack, Diane and Princess Carolyn pursue new opportunities.

4.name: See Mr. Peanutbutter Run
4.overview: Mr. Peanutbutter's campaign to recall the governor of California culminates in a high-stakes ski race. Meanwhile, BoJack is nowhere to be found.

4.name: The Old Sugarman Place
4.overview: BoJack goes off the grid and winds up at his grandparents' dilapidated home in Michigan, where he befriends a dragonfly haunted by the past.

4.name: Hooray! Todd Episode!
4.overview: Helpful to a fault, Todd is spread thin doing favors for Princess Carolyn, Mr. Peanutbutter and a visitor with a potential connection to BoJack.

4.name: Commence Fracking
4.overview: The campaign takes a toll on Diane's love life. BoJack helps Hollyhock search for her mom. Princess Carolyn tries to get pregnant.

4.name: Thoughts and Prayers
4.overview: A mass shooting at a mall creates a PR nightmare for Princess Carolyn. BoJack takes Hollyhock to visit his estranged mother.

4.name: Stupid Piece of Sh*t
4.overview: Surrounded by family, BoJack spirals into self-loathing. Princess Carolyn and Rutabaga Rabitowitz plan Courtney and Todd's sham wedding.

4.name: Underground
4.overview: Mr. Peanutbutter's posh campaign fundraiser takes a terrifying turn. As chaos swirls around them, BoJack and Diane get drunk.

4.name: The Judge
4.overview: Hollyhock starts dating an intern on BoJack's new show. Princess Carolyn meets Ralph's parents. Mr. Peanutbutter throws his support behind Woodchuck.

4.name: Ruthie
4.overview: On one awful day, Princess Carolyn deals with rejection, deception and loss. BoJack and Diane try to track down Hollyhock's birth certificate.

4.name: lovin that cali lifestyle!!
4.overview: Diane leaks damaging information on Jessica Biel, Todd's clown dentist business hits a snag, and Princess Carolyn finds hope in an unlikely place.

4.name: Time's Arrow
4.overview: In 1963, young socialite Beatrice Sugarman meets the rebellious Butterscotch Horseman at her debutante party.

4.name: What Time Is It Right Now
4.overview: Princess Carolyn pitches "Philbert" to company execs. Todd gets a better business idea. BoJack comes to a realization about Hollyhock.

5.name: The Light Bulb Scene
5.overview: BoJack has misgivings about his new show. Princess Carolyn visits an adoption agency. Todd interviews for a job at WhatTimeIsItRightNow.com.

5.name: The Dog Days Are Over
5.overview: Diane divorces Mr. Peanutbutter and moves into a shabby studio. Feeling melancholy, she travels to Vietnam to get away from it all.

5.name: Planned Obsolescence
5.overview: Todd meets Yolanda's parents, who don't know she's asexual. Mr. Peanutbutter romances a young waitress. Gina confesses a childhood dream to BoJack.

5.name: BoJack the Feminist
5.overview: When Princess Carolyn casts a disgraced celeb in "Philbert," BoJack inadvertently takes a stand. Mr. Peanutbutter tries to toughen up his image.

5.name: The Amelia Earhart Story
5.overview: Painful memories come rushing back when Princess Carolyn visits her hometown and meets a pregnant teen. A stunt goes awry on the "Philbert" set.

5.name: Free Churro
5.overview: BoJack delivers a eulogy at a funeral.

5.name: INT. SUB
5.overview: Diane's therapist encourages her to set boundaries with BoJack. A missing string cheese ignites a dispute between Todd and Princess Carolyn.

5.name: Mr. Peanutbutter's Boos
5.overview: At BoJack's 25th annual Halloween party, Pickles gets a crash course in Mr. Peanutbutter's romantic history -- and some advice from Diane.

5.name: Ancient History
5.overview: A visiting Hollyhock dumps BoJack's painkillers, sending him on a desperate search for more. Todd tries to solve Emily's dating dilemma.

5.name: Head in the Clouds
5.overview: At the "Philbert" premiere party, Princess Carolyn deftly negotiates a deal, Gina steps into the limelight, and Diane confronts BoJack.

5.name: The Showstopper
5.overview: "Philbert" is a hit, and filming begins on Season 2. But as BoJack spirals deeper into addiction, he loses his grip on reality.

5.name: The Stopped Show
5.overview: In the midst of the latest PR crisis, Princess Carolyn gets a life-changing opportunity. With Diane's help, BoJack finally faces the music.

6.name: A Horse Walks into a Rehab
6.overview: BoJack checks into Pastiches, a Malibu rehab facility, where he grapples with memories of Sarah Lynn's death and his own troubled childhood.

6.name: The New Client
6.overview: When her nanny quits, Princess Carolyn struggles to balance the demands of work and parenting. Mr. Peanutbutter visits BoJack in rehab.

6.name: Feel-Good Story
6.overview: Girl Croosh sends Diane on the road with rugged cameraman Guy, but she balks when they ask her to produce more feel-good stories.

6.name: Surprise!
6.overview: Todd organizes a surprise wedding for Pickles and Mr. Peanutbutter, but the party quickly goes off the rails when Mr. Peanutbutter makes a confession.

6.name: A Little Uneven, Is All
6.overview: Dr. Champ tells BoJack it's time to leave rehab. Mr. Peanutbutter's reputation takes a hit. In Chicago, Diane wrestles with writer's block.

6.name: The Kidney Stays in the Picture
6.overview: The assistants of Hollywoo go on strike. BoJack tries to help Dr. Champ. When Todd learns that his mother needs a kidney, Diane comes up with a plan.

6.name: The Face of Depression
6.overview: BoJack travels around the country reconnecting with loved ones, while Mr. Peanutbutter embarks on his own national tour as the face of depression.

6.name: A Quick One, While He's Away
6.overview: A reporter digs into the circumstances surrounding Sarah Lynn's death. Hollyhock goes to a party in New York City.

6.name: Intermediate Scene Study w/ BoJack Horseman
6.overview: When BoJack starts teaching an acting class at Wesleyan, Hollyhock sets some boundaries in their relationship

6.name: Good Damage
6.overview: Diane's depression lifts, but she's still struggling to start writing her memoir. Reporters Paige and Max pay Penny a visit.

6.name: Sunk Cost and All That
6.overview: While Paige and Max question Mr. Peanutbutter at his restaurant, a panicked BoJack tries to piece together what's happening.

6.name: Xerox of a Xerox
6.overview: After the Sarah Lynn story breaks, BoJack gives a live interview on TV. Diane meets Guy's teenage son.

6.name: The Horny Unicorn
6.overview: BoJack gets a new AA sponsor. Todd plans a sophisticated party to impress his parents. Diane gets to know Sonny.

6.name: Angela
6.overview: Angela Diaz reaches out to BoJack. Princess Carolyn gets an offer from Lenny Turteltaub. Todd cooks up a scheme.

6.name: The View from Halfway Down
6.overview: BoJack reconnects with faces from his past.

6.name: Nice While It Lasted
6.overview: A celebration brings people together.

1.name: Pilot
1.overview: When an unassuming high school chemistry teacher discovers he has a rare form of lung cancer, he decides to team up with a former student and create a top of the line crystal meth in a used RV, to provide for his family once he is gone.

1.name: Cat's in the Bag...
1.overview: Walt and Jesse attempt to tie up loose ends. The desperate situation gets more complicated with the flip of a coin. Walt's wife, Skyler, becomes suspicious of Walt's strange behavior.

1.name: ...And the Bag's in the River
1.overview: Walter fights with Jesse over his drug use, causing him to leave Walter alone with their captive, Krazy-8. Meanwhile, Hank has a scared straight moment with Walter Jr. after his aunt discovers he has been smoking pot. Also, Skylar is upset when Walter stays away from home.

1.name: Cancer Man
1.overview: Walter finally tells his family that he has been stricken with cancer. Meanwhile, the DEA believes Albuquerque has a new, big time player to worry about. Meanwhile, a worthy recipient is the target of a depressed Walter's anger, and Jesse makes a surprise visit to his parents home.

1.name: Gray Matter
1.overview: Walter and Skyler attend a former colleague's party. Jesse tries to free himself from the drugs, while Skyler organizes an intervention.

1.name: Crazy Handful of Nothin'
1.overview: The side effects of chemo begin to plague Walt. Meanwhile, the DEA rounds up suspected dealers.

1.name: A No Rough Stuff Type Deal
1.overview: Walter accepts his new identity as a drug dealer after a PTA meeting. Elsewhere, Jesse decides to put his aunt's house on the market and Skyler is the recipient of a baby shower.

2.name: Seven Thirty-Seven
2.overview: Walt and Jesse are vividly reminded of Tuco’s volatile nature, and try to figure a way out of their business partnership. Hank attempts to mend fences between the estranged Marie and Skyler.

2.name: Grilled
2.overview: Walt and Jesse find themselves in close quarters with an unhinged Tuco. Marie and Hank comfort Skyler, who is distraught over Walt’s disappearance. Hank pays a visit to Mrs. Pinkman on some not-so-official business.

2.name: Bit by a Dead Bee
2.overview: Walt and Jesse become short on cash when they try to cover their tracks. Meanwhile, the DEA has a lead that could them straight to Walt and Jesse.

2.name: Down
2.overview: Walt attempts to reconnect with his family, while Jesse struggles to rebuild his life.

2.name: Breakage
2.overview: Hank suffers from the aftermath of his encounter with Tuco. Meanwhile, Jesse hires a crew to get their product out on the streets.

2.name: Peekaboo
2.overview: Walt's secret is in jeopardy when Skyler thanks Gretchen for paying for his treatment.

2.name: Negro y Azul
2.overview: Jesse and Walt discuss expanding into new territories; Hank struggles to fit in; Skyler pursues a new job opportunity; Jesse gets to know his landlord.

2.name: Better Call Saul
2.overview: Walt and Jesse seek advice from a shady attorney when Badger gets in trouble with the law; the DEA believes they have caught up with "Heisenberg" ; Hank returns.

2.name: 4 Days Out
2.overview: Walt and his family wait for news after he undergoes a PET-CT scan. Walt follows Saul's advice; Jesse's relationship with Jane is put on hold when he and Walt head to the desert for a marathon of cooking.

2.name: Over
2.overview: Walt and Hank get into a heated argument at a party. Skyler opens up to her boss. Jane hides her relationship with Jesse from her father.

2.name: Mandala
2.overview: As the end of her pregnancy finds Skyler conflicted about her feelings, a dealer's death forces Walt to look for somewhere to unload a load of meth.

2.name: Phoenix
2.overview: As Walt explores money laundering options, he and Jesse spar over the profits from their latest deal. Jesse and Jane clash with her father. Walt makes a fatal decision.

2.name: ABQ
2.overview: Skyler confronts Walt about his secrecy; Jesse falls apart; and Jane's grief-stricken father takes action that results in further tragedy.

3.name: No Más
3.overview: Walt faces a new threat, on a new front and deals with an increasingly angry Skyler, who must consider what to do next with her life and the kids. Meanwhile, Jesse comes face-to-face with some startling self-revelations.

3.name: Caballo sin Nombre
3.overview: Despite ever-increasing tension between Walt and Skyler, he pulls out all the stops in an effort to reconcile with the family. Elsewhere, Saul is instrumental in getting Jesse involved in a most-unusual investment opportunity.

3.name: I.F.T.
3.overview: Walt ignores Skyler's demands, furthering the rift between them and pushing her to break bad. Still suffering from panic and anxiety attacks, Hank crosses a line at work.

3.name: Green Light
3.overview: Walt loses control as he reacts to Skyler's news, endangering his job and relationships with Saul and Jesse. Hank throws himself into his blue meth investigation. Jesse enacts a new plan.

3.name: Más
3.overview: Gus increases his efforts to lure Walt back into business, forcing a rift between Walt and Jesse. Skyler doubts her new relationship. Marie confides in Skyler about her concern for Hank's well-being.

3.name: Sunset
3.overview: Walt settles into his new surroundings; Walt, Jr. wants answers about his parents' relationship; Hank's investigation causes problems for Walt and Jesse.

3.name: One Minute
3.overview: Hank's increasing volatility forces a confrontation with Jesse and trouble at work. Skyler pressures Walt to make a deal. Gus' actions have severe consequences.

3.name: I See You
3.overview: The family waits for news about Hank. While Jesse covers at the lab, Walt attempts to placate Gus. After witnessing a disturbing outburst, Walt worries he and his family are in danger.

3.name: Kafkaesque
3.overview: As Hank's hospital bills stack up, Skyler hatches a plan. Walt and Gus come to a better understanding. Jesse, looking for more independence, pursues a new opportunity.

3.name: Fly
3.overview: Walt becomes obsessed with a contaminant in the lab and refuses to finish the cook until it is eliminated. A frustrated Jesse attempts to get Walt back on track.

3.name: Abiquiu
3.overview: Skyler gets involved with Walt's business. Hank struggles with his recovery. Jesse makes a startling discovery after meeting a girl at group therapy.

3.name: Half Measures
3.overview: Against Walt's advice, Jesse lashes out. Fearing for Jesse's safety, Walt takes drastic action to intervene and tragic event leads to a shocking confrontation.

3.name: Full Measure
3.overview: With Jesse on the run and Mike in hot pursuit, Walt negotiates a bargain with Gus and concocts a disturbing plan to provide for his and Jesse's safety.

4.name: Box Cutter
4.overview: Walt and Jesse face the deadly consequences of their actions. Skyler deals with a puzzling disappearance, as Marie struggles to help Hank with his recovery.

4.name: Thirty-Eight Snub
4.overview: Walt attempts to form a new alliance as he plans his next move. Skyler pushes Walt towards a business opportunity, in hopes of protecting the family.

4.name: Open House
4.overview: Events spiral out of control at Jesse's place. Skyler reluctantly asks for Saul's help. Marie returns to an old pastime and a friend asks Hank for help.

4.name: Bullet Points
4.overview: The Cartel takes steps to gain the upper hand. Walt and Skyler share an embarrassing secret with the rest of the family. Jesse's activities draw unwanted attention.

4.name: Shotgun
4.overview: When Jesse goes missing, Walt fears the worst. Skyler has an unlikely reunion. Hank shares some bad news with Detective Tim Roberts.

4.name: Cornered
4.overview: Skyler makes an unsettling discovery. Walter, Jr. pushes his dad into a questionable purchase. Jesse offers Mike some unexpected help.

4.name: Problem Dog
4.overview: A frustrated Walt gambles on a risky new plan. Skyler's business venture hits a snag. Hank recruits Walter, Jr. for an unusual outing.

4.name: Hermanos
4.overview: Skyler develops an unusual solution to her money troubles. Hank enlists Walt to investigate a theory. Walt's impatience with Jesse grows.

4.name: Bug
4.overview: Skyler's past mistakes come back to haunt her. Gus takes action to thwart his rivals. Jesse seeks Walt's help, with mixed results.

4.name: Salud
4.overview: Walt's family worries when he doesn't turn up for Walter, Jr.'s 16th birthday. Jesse is forced to put his lab skills to the test without Mr. White's help.

4.name: Crawl Space
4.overview: Walt takes drastic action to protect his secret and Gus. Skyler's efforts to solve Ted's financial problems hit a wall.

4.name: End Times
4.overview: Hank pushes Gomez to pursue one last lead, while Walt struggles to protect the family. Jesse gets alarming news and rushes to meet with Mr. White.

4.name: Face Off
4.overview: Walt and Jesse team up to take on Gus. With Saul's help, Walt finds an unexpected ally.

5.name: Live Free or Die
5.overview: As Walt deals with the aftermath of the Casa Tranquila explosion, Hank works to wrap up his investigation of Gus' empire.

5.name: Madrigal
5.overview: Walt and Jesse pursue an unlikely business partner. The DEA filters through various leads in hopes of finding something.

5.name: Hazard Pay
5.overview: Walt and Jesse formulate a new business plan. Walt shares a secret with Marie.

5.name: Fifty-One
5.overview: Walt celebrates another birthday. Skyler contemplates her options, and an associate puts a crimp in Walt and Jesse's business strategy.

5.name: Dead Freight
5.overview: Walt's team gets creative to obtain the methylamine they need to continue their operation.

5.name: Buyout
5.overview: Walt, Jesse, and Mike struggle over the future of their business, as occupational hazards weigh on Jesse.

5.name: Say My Name
5.overview: Walt takes control of business matters; Mike deals with the consequences of his actions.

5.name: Gliding Over All
5.overview: Walt takes care of loose ends; Walt makes a dangerous decision.

5.name: Blood Money
5.overview: As Walt and Jesse adjust to life out of the business, Hank grapples with a troubling lead.

5.name: Buried
5.overview: While Skyler's past catches up with her, Walt covers his tracks. Jesse continues to struggle with his guilt.

5.name: Confessions
5.overview: Jesse decides to make a change, while Walt and Skyler try to deal with an unexpected demand.

5.name: Rabid Dog
5.overview: An unusual strategy starts to bear fruit, while plans are set in motion that could change everything.

5.name: To'hajiilee
5.overview: Things heat up for Walt in unexpected ways.

5.name: Ozymandias
5.overview: Everyone copes with radically changed circumstances.

5.name: Granite State
5.overview: Events set in motion long ago move toward a conclusion.

5.name: Felina
5.overview: All bad things must come to an end.

1.name: Pilot
1.overview: When the legitimacy of his degree is challenged, lawyer Jeff Winger must return to school, where he meets a clan of misfit community college students.

1.name: Spanish 101
1.overview: While Jeff looks to use a Spanish class assignment to get close to Britta, Pierce has something altogether different in mind.

1.name: Introduction to Film
1.overview: Jeff struggles to get a good grade, and Britta's offer to bankroll his film class exposes a rift between Abed and his angry father.

1.name: Social Psychology
1.overview: As Annie recruits Abed and Troy for a psychology class experiment, Jeff and Shirley bond over their mutual fondness for gossip.

1.name: Advanced Criminal Law
1.overview: As Pierce volunteers to compose a new school song, a cheating episode in Spanish class leaves Jeff defending Britta before a disciplinary tribunal.

1.name: Football, Feminism and You
1.overview: Annie's dream of being the ex-football star's girlfriend is in jeopardy when Jeff is blackmailed into getting Troy to join Greendale's football team.

1.name: Introduction to Statistics
1.overview: Jeff sets his sights on an attractive professor, and Annie looks to boost her social standing by hosting a Day of the Dead party.

1.name: Home Economics
1.overview: Jeff is forced out of his condo and into Abed's dorm room, and Annie looks to get Troy's attention by helping him plan a romantic picnic.

1.name: Debate 109
1.overview: As Jeff is drafted to help lead Greendale's debate team against the formidable City College, Abed's film-class projects appear to predict the future.

1.name: Environmental Science
1.overview: Faced with an unreasonable amount of Spanish homework, Jeff's efforts to handle Señor Chang manage to help him, but not the rest of the class.

1.name: The Politics of Human Sexuality
1.overview: With his high-price "escort" girlfriend on his arm, Pierce pressures Jeff into asking Dean Pelton's airhead secretary to double date at the STD Fair.

1.name: Comparative Religion
1.overview: Shirley's plans for a holiday party are in jeopardy when Jeff is drawn into a fight with a campus bully.

1.name: Investigative Journalism
1.overview: Jeff accepts an invitation to be the editor of the school paper as he and his friends fend off an interloper who wants to join their study group.

1.name: Interpretive Dance
1.overview: As Jeff and Prof. Slater try to keep their student-teacher romance under wraps, Britta and Troy tell everyone about their shared passion for dance.

1.name: Romantic Expressionism
1.overview: Jeff and Britta team up to derail Annie's fledgling romance with Greendale's resident hippie singer-songwriter, Vaughn.

1.name: Communication Studies
1.overview: As Valentine's Day finds Jeff struggling with his feelings for Britta and Professor Slater, Pierce and Troy are wrongly blamed for a prank.

1.name: Physical Education
1.overview: The study group helps Abed land a date with a girl, and Jeff squares off with a P.E. coach who insists that he wear gym shorts to a billiards class.

1.name: Basic Genealogy
1.overview: As Family Day lands Jeff in the middle of an affair with Pierce's sexy ex-stepdaughter, Shirley's unruly sons help liberate Abed's Afghani cousin.

1.name: Beginner Pottery
1.overview: A pottery class he takes for an easy A reveals Jeff's deep-seated need to succeed.

1.name: The Science of Illusion
1.overview: When her April Fools' Day prank inadvertently sends a human cadaver out the anatomy lab window, Britta looks to place the blame on Jeff.

1.name: Contemporary American Poultry
1.overview: A scheme to replace a corrupt cafeteria employee transforms the study group into a criminal gang run by a power-hungry Abed.

1.name: The Art of Discourse
